summary: Tested Concierge floating button on /care desktop pillar page at 1440x900 viewport. All 4 required behaviors verified and passing.

test_results.TEST_1_button_in_DOM: PASS - [data-testid='concierge-builder-float-btn'] found in DOM, visible=true, position:fixed bottom:96 right:24 zIndex:100000, size=207.8x48px
test_results.TEST_2_console_log: PASS - '[log] CONCIERGE BUTTON CLICKED false' fired exactly as expected after button click
test_results.TEST_3_sheet_appears: PASS - Sheet div with 'How can Concierge® help?' renders after click. MutationObserver confirmed DOM insertion. Sheet is position:fixed inset:0 zIndex:100001 with blurred overlay and white panel showing PillarConciergeCards
test_results.TEST_4_close_button: PASS - 'Close ✕' button dismisses the sheet; 'How can Concierge® help?' text removed from DOM after close click

context_for_next_testing_agent: Concierge floating button portal flow is fully working: button visible at 1440px desktop, click fires CONCIERGE BUTTON CLICKED console.log, bottom sheet renders with PillarConciergeCards, close button dismisses it. Tested on /care page without login (page accessible as guest). First test run had a navigation timing issue (networkidle timeout) which caused false-negative; second run starting directly at /care URL confirmed all pass.
